name: Lamb Persillade
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Mix the parsley, minced garlic, bread crumbs, Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper together to form a crumbly paste.
3. Roast the racks of lamb in the preheated oven until they are very rare, about 10 minutes.
4. Spread the crumb mixture over the lamb and press it firmly into place.
5. Return the lamb to the oven and cook to your desired doneness.
Makes 1 Rack
